title: PreparePhase2SpecReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``prepare-phase2-spec`` (#279).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see
envelope.json). Carries the derived Phase-2 main-array submit-flow spec
plus the two boolean flips that were applied. ``phase2_spec`` is the
Phase-1 spec with exactly canary=false, canary_only=false and every other
field copied verbatim; it has already been validated against SubmitFlowSpec
(submit_flow.input.json), so a caller can hand it straight to ``hpc-agent
submit-flow --spec`` for the Phase-2 main-array launch without a spec-rebuild
round-trip. (#283: the former skip_rsync_deploy flip was dropped — that bypass
is now operator/internal-only and off the wire SubmitFlowSpec, so a wire spec
cannot carry it.)

flips_applied.title: Flips Applied
flips_applied.description: The two boolean flips applied to the Phase-1 spec, echoed back so the caller can audit exactly what changed.

canary.title: Canary
canary.description: Always false: the canary already ran in Phase 1.

canary_only.title: Canary Only
canary_only.description: Always false: Phase 2 IS the main-array launch, not another canary-only gate.
